meta.intent: Create a generous, capture-friendly ice payoff after the L28 exam.
meta.expectedPath: Follow the frozen rescue lane, break through the central ice, rescue the hero puppy, then finish the secondary target with low dock risk.
meta.expectedFailMode: Broad clearing delays the spectacle route, but the board stays recoverable unless the player repeatedly ignores rescue progress.
meta.whatItProves: Ice can feel emotionally satisfying and readable, not just like route obstruction.
meta.notes: Role: spectacle. Empty cells form the frozen rescue lane and water/readability space; no crates or vines so the ice payoff remains clean.
